PLAINTIFF ZOILA SORIANO'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM DEFENDANT THE KROGER CO.; TO DEEM PROPOUNDED ADMISSIONS AS ADMITTED; AND FOR SANCTIONS AND ATTORNEYS FEES.

APPEARANCES: Stephen MacLean, Esq. of Albert G. Stoll, Jr./A Law Corporation 441-8916 for pltf & moving party; Marlon D'Oyen, Esq. of Clinton & Clinton 562/216-5000 for deft & opposing party.

RULING: Discussed and the Court continued the matter to 03/09/11 at 9:00am if necessary as parties ordered to meet & confer in an attempt to resolve issues. Court granted sanctions portion requested in motion, as no opposition was filed. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
